summary: Backend API testing complete for Express Banners media endpoints. Core /media endpoint functionality works correctly, but several issues identified with production deployment.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not found on production
Returns 404 - endpoint not found on production
Returns 500 with error 'Unable to load gallery media'
Returns 500 with error 'Unable to load service media'

working_endpoints.details: Returns proper JSON with folder validation, 200 for valid requests, 400 for missing folder param

deployment_issues.issue: Debug and folders endpoints missing from production
deployment_issues.details: Routes defined in server.js but returning 404 on production URL
deployment_issues.impact: Cannot verify Dynamic Folder Mode implementation

deployment_issues.details: All Cloudinary-dependent endpoints returning 500 errors with generic messages
deployment_issues.impact: No media loading, suggests env var or API configuration issues

passed_tests: GET /media?folder=... returns 200 JSON with media items (structure correct, 0 items)
GET /media without folder returns 400 JSON error
server/lib/cloudinary.js listByFolder function exists (confirmed by endpoint functionality)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Multiple deployment and Cloudinary issues on production. 1) /media/debug and /media/folders endpoints return 404 (not deployed). 2) All Cloudinary-dependent endpoints (/api/gallery, /api/services-media) return 500 errors suggesting env vars or API configuration problems. 3) Verify production deployment includes all routes from server.js. 4) Check Cloudinary environment variables on Cloud Run. 5) Test Dynamic Folder Mode functionality once Cloudinary connection is restored.
